overall.description: A third-person perspective clip from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with a mohawk sitting on a city bench in a futuristic neon-lit urban environment, drinking from a cup and observing street life, before standing up and walking away down the bustling sidewalk. The scene features bright midday sunlight, modern glass architecture, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk bench overlooking multi-lane street

events.description: pedestrian traffic increases with several people walking past the bench in quick succession
character places cup down on the bench and begins to rise from seated position

agents.ego_description: sitting on a concrete bench drinking from a disposable cup, casually observing pedestrians and traffic passing by on the busy street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in beige trench coat walking along the sidewalk past the bench
pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street in the distance

entered.detail: concrete bench with red painted surface where the character is seated
small teal-colored compact car parked at the curb
multi-story commercial building with reflective glass facade and corporate signage
large pink neon billboard displaying 'TENGO' text on the building facade
silver metal crowd control barriers separating the sidewalk from the street
mature green leafy trees planted along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character sits on a concrete bench in a sunny cyberpunk city street, drinking from a cup while pedestrians walk past and cars drive by on the multi-lane road. The scene features modern glass buildings, prominent pink neon billboards, and moderate urban activity with people moving in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with commercial storefronts and neon signage

events.description: character stands up from the bench and begins walking forward down the sidewalk
camera pans right to follow the character, revealing additional buildings and street elements previously out of view

agents.ego_description: stands up from the bench and walks away down the busy sidewalk, moving through pedestrian traffic while the camera follows from behind

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the same direction ahead of the character
yellow taxi cab driving past on the street to the left

entered.detail: tall commercial building with distinctive orange and green facade featuring large vertical advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character stands up and walks away from the bench down the bustling sidewalk, with the camera panning to follow from a third-person perspective. The view shifts to reveal more of the vibrant cityscape including a tall orange building with large advertisements, while the bench and parked car are left behind and new pedestrians enter the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a static observation of a character on a city bench to a dynamic walk through a vibrant cyberpunk district. It begins with the character sitting on a concrete bench under bright midday sunlight, drinking from a cup as pedestrians and cars flow past modern glass buildings and pink neon billboards. As the character stands up, the camera pans to follow from a third-person perspective, shifting the focus from the stationary bench and a parked car toward the bustling sidewalk. The scene then expands to reveal more of the towering cityscape, including a prominent orange building adorned with large advertisements. Finally, the camera tracks the character's movement deeper into the urban environment as new pedestrians enter the frame and the initial resting spot recedes into the distance.
